title: Code Review Findings
description: Structured output schema for review deep-mode personas

findings.description: List of code review findings. Empty array if no issues found.

file.description: Relative file path from repository root

line.description: Primary line number of the issue

persona.description: Persona name that produced this finding

title.description: Short, specific issue title. 10 words or fewer.

severity.description: Issue severity by observable behavioral impact

behavioral-impact.description: The observable failure this causes, or 'none -- advisory'

confidence.description: Confidence level. high = can cite the failing input or path. med = strong structural evidence, no repro. low = suspicion only.

action-class.description: Routing hint: safe = fix unattended; gated = needs verified batches; manual = needs design decision; advisory = report-only.

evidence.description: path:line citation or a one-line repro

pre_existing.description: true if the issue exists in unchanged code unrelated to this diff. Reported separately; does not count toward the review verdict.

confidence_levels.high: Can cite the failing input or path. Report.
confidence_levels.med: Strong structural evidence, no repro. Report unless below the confidence gate threshold.
confidence_levels.low: Suspicion only. Drop unless corroborated by another persona.

severity_definitions.P0: Reachable now by ordinary or untrusted input: data loss, security breach, crash on a normal path, regression in a shipped contract. Ship-blocker.
severity_definitions.P1: Wrong output or failure on a plausible input; resource exhaustion under expected load; a contract break behind a flag or edge. Fix before merge.
severity_definitions.P2: Degraded behavior on an uncommon path; a changed branch with no test that can break silently; maintainability debt with a named future-defect path. Fix or file.
severity_definitions.P3: No behavioral impact: style, naming, micro-optimization with no measured win. Advisory.

action_classes.safe: Mechanical, behavior-preserving, single-site, unambiguous fix. Route to fix.
action_classes.gated: Clear fix but touches a contract or multiple sites. Route to review-fix-grill-loop.
action_classes.manual: Needs a human design decision. Surface as a question.
action_classes.advisory: Opinion or nit. Recording it is the action.
